name: odoo-skills-v19
description: Codex plugin that packages Odoo-focused skills for development and delivery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Odoo development, testing, review, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Odoo Skills to guide Odoo architecture, ORM modeling, views, security, performance, integrations, migrations, tests, reviews, and delivery workflows.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan an Odoo feature.
Run or design Odoo tests for this module.
